<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Get the injection token for a named Nest boundary binding.

## Import

```ts
import { getNestBoundaryToken } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function getNestBoundaryToken(bindingId: string): symbol
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bindingId` | `string` | Stable identifier used by the emitted record. |

## Returns

A `symbol` value.

## Example

```ts
import { getNestBoundaryToken } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs.ts`
